supersedes: soldier-view-media-v2 (superseding-pending-owner-review: the shipped v1 media stays untouched on disk and in the release until the owner adopts v2)
publishCommand: gh release create soldier-view-media-v2 app/RenderOutput/angle-v2/garnett-road-to-angle.v2.full.mp4 app/RenderOutput/angle-v2/garnett-road-to-angle.v2.proxy.mp4 docs/benchmarks/captures/angle-v2-data/angle-v2-release-manifest.json --title 'Soldier View media v2 (PENDING OWNER REVIEW) — garnett-road-to-angle' --notes-file docs/benchmarks/captures/angle-v2-data/angle-v2-release-notes.md
note: Owner publishes at Phase 12 (plan §12). Do not publish from Phase 10.
